{{CargoRelic
|name=Resort Postcard
|class_id=20951
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Developed by the dev team, this commemorative postcard features high-resolution photos showcasing the scenic beauty of the resort. A perfect choice for capturing moments to share with friends and family!
|fame=30
|art=18
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=12
|ss1=Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +4<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail RUSH +4<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss2=Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +8<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail RUSH +8<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss3=Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +12<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail RUSH +12<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss4=Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +12<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail RUSH +12<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss7=Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +12<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail RUSH +12<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
